title: Dijon mustard roast chicken and tarragon gravy
ingredients: 1 large whole chicken (1.8–2 kg/4lb–4lb 8oz), 100g/3½oz Dijon mustard, plus 2 tsp for the gravy (about ½ a jar) , 1 tbsp olive oil, ½ lemon, 10g fresh thyme, 6 carrots, roughly chopped, 4–6 onions, roughly chopped, 4 celery stalks, roughly chopped, 1 head garlic, cloves separated and bruised (see Recipe Tips), 100ml/3½fl oz white wine, 200ml/7fl oz chicken stock (or water), 1 tbsp Worcestershire sauce, 1 tbsp soy sauce, 1 bunch tarragon (approx. 20g/⅔oz), chopped, 1 tbsp cold butter, cubed, ½ tsp sugar (optional), 1 tsp vinegar (optional), salt
